pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 7: MODEL_DIR is set to $BC_MODELS/PilotBoat_ORC where BC_MODELS=/opt/bridgecommand/Models/Othership
setup_task.sh line 17: boat.ini is created within the model directory
setup_task.sh lines 8-9: SPEC_FILE set to $DOCS_DIR/geometry_spec.txt where DOCS_DIR=/home/ga/Documents
setup_task.sh lines 108-113 define ground_truth with keys for masthead, port, starboard, stern; verifier.py lines 143-196 verify all four light types

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring navigation lights for a synthetic vessel model called 'PilotBoat_ORC'. The vessel geometry (length 15-19m, beam 4.5-6.0m) is randomly generated during task setup using setup_task.sh, which creates a geometry specification file at /home/ga/Documents/geometry_spec.txt and stores ground truth coordinates at /tmp/nav_light_ground_truth.json. The task requires placing four lights (Masthead/white, Port/red, Starboard/green, Stern/white) at computed coordinates within a vessel configuration file at /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Othership/PilotBoat_ORC/boat.ini. The coordinate system origin is at the stern at waterline, with X-axis forward, Y-axis starboard, and Z-axis up. All data is procedurally generated and synthetic; no external datasets are used.
